'''Charmath''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Farrfin sector/Legends|Farrfin sector]] of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Galactic Core]] with one of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy's]] most complete historical archives.

Site of the famous [[University of Charmath]], [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] historian [[Arhul Hextrophon/Legends|Arhul Hextrophon]] searched through old, classified data files at the University in order to find the hidden location of [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] for his work, ''Official History of the Rebellion, Volume One''. After meeting with Yoda on [[Dagobah/Legends|Dagobah]], Hextrophon wiped out all records of Yoda's existence from the University's [[Computer/Legends|computer]] in order to preserve his anonymity and keep the hope for the Alliance alive.

{{Planet-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The PC game [[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']] places Charmath in the Farfin sector, a misspelling of the true Farrfin sector.
